code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn second_token_int(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + n
      end
    when None
      i = n + n
    end
  end
  mut start1 = 0
  if i >= n + n
    start1 = i - n - n
  else
    return None
  end
  mut j = start1
  while j < n
    match string.byte_at(line, j)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        j = n + n + j
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    when None
      j = n + n + j
    end
  end
  mut end1 = n
  if j >= n + n
    end1 = j - n - n
  end
  mut k = end1
  while k < n
    match string.byte_at(line, k)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        k = k + 1
      else
        k = n + n + k
      end
    when None
      k = n + n + k
    end
  end
  mut start2 = n
  if k >= n + n
    start2 = k - n - n
  else
    return None
  end
  mut m = start2
  while m < n
    match string.byte_at(line, m)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        m = n + n + m
      else
        m = m + 1
      end
    when None
      m = n + n + m
    end
  end
  mut end2 = n
  if m >= n + n
    end2 = m - n - n
  end
  let tok = string.substring(line, start2, end2)
  string.parse_int(tok)
end

fn is_blank(_ line: String) -> Bool
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut blank = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if not is_ws(b)
        blank = false
        i = n
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  blank
end

mut total = 0
mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not is_blank(line)
      match second_token_int(line)
      when Some(v)
        total = total + v
      when None
        total = total
      end
    end
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
println("sum=#{total}")
